loginFooter: Sign in uses the Socratix API — use the account you registered.
dashboardWelcomeGuest: Ideas shaping the future of the organisation.
emptyFeed: No ideas in this view yet.
emptyFeedCreate: Be the first to submit one.
messagesSubtitle: Discuss ideas and collaborate with colleagues on Socratix.
messagesEmptyTeammates: No teammates yet. Register another user to start messaging.
forgotSubtitle: Enter your work email. If the account exists, you will get a reset token (shown here in development when the server allows it).
forgotTokenHelp: Paste the token returned by the server after the previous step.
forgotStep2Next: Enter the token, then your new password.
forgotSuccessBody: You can sign in with your new password.
forgotGenericSent: If this email is registered, follow the instructions you received.
forgotErrRequest: Could not start reset. Try again.
forgotErrReset: Reset failed. Check token and try again.
profileLogoutHint: All session state will be cleared.
signUpWorkspaceSubtitle: Set up your innovation profile — takes 30 seconds.
signUpPasswordTooShort: Use at least 6 characters for your password.
signUpThemesRequired: Select at least one innovation theme.
profile.invalidImageType: Only JPG, PNG, or WEBP images are allowed.
profile.imageTooLarge: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
profile.aboutMePlaceholder: A short note about your role and innovation interests.
profile.saveError: Could not save profile. Try again.
profile.emailComments: Email me when my ideas receive new comments
profile.weeklyDigest: Weekly digest — top ideas across departments
profile.voteAlert: Alert me when one of my ideas gets a new vote
profile.earlyAccess: Early access to experimental AI prompts
create.subtitle: Capture the problem, the change you propose, and what success looks like in one quarter.
create.titlePlaceholder: e.g., Self-serve onboarding checklist for complex SKUs
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Who is impacted, what changes, and how will we measure adoption within 90 days?
create.errTitleDescAi: Add a title and description before running AI Improve.
create.errSignIn: You must be signed in to continue.
create.errSave: Could not save your idea. Try again.
edit.title: Edit idea
edit.subtitle: Update the title, description, or category. Other fields stay unchanged.
idea.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this idea?
idea.aiReviewSkipped: AI review was skipped. Document risks directly in the description before the steering committee review.
idea.noComments: No comments yet. Start the thread.
idea.commentPlaceholder: Ask a clarifying question, offer to pilot, or link to related data.
devil.title: AI Review
devil.subtitle: Answer three AI-generated review questions one at a time. Your idea is submitted after the final response.
devil.noQuestions: No questions were returned. Try refreshing the page.
devil.answerPlaceholder: Constraints, owners, and what would falsify this approach.
ai.allResolved: ✓ All suggestions resolved. Your idea is ready to continue.
